name: bash
description: Execute a shell command. Returns stdout+stderr combined and exit code. Use pty=true for commands that need an interactive terminal (color output, progress bars).

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds. Omit to use the default (30s).

workdir.description: Working directory path. Omit to use the current directory.

pty.description: Run in a pseudo-terminal. Preserves color output and isatty(). Unix only. Default false.
